_comment: Systems whose games are conventionally one FOLDER of many files, referenced from gamelist.xml by a marker/index file inside that folder (Sega Lindbergh's .game marker; disc systems' .gdi/.cue next to their .bin tracks). For these systems a gamelist <path> that is a file inside a subfolder transfers its immediate parent folder as the unit. Systems NOT listed here (e.g. c64/scummvm sets organized into shared category folders) always keep single-file behavior. Vendored point-in-time snapshot seeded from Batocera es_systems conventions; NOT auto-updated.
